owner-1.name: Marcus Vance
owner-1.bio: Mechanical engineer and prototyping enthusiast. I own industrial-grade fabrication and 3D printing equipment that sits idle on weekdays. Happy to share tips on print optimization!

owner-2.name: Elena Rostova
owner-2.bio: Custom furniture builder and woodworker. I maintain all my cutting tools and blades in razor-sharp condition. Treat them with respect and safety first!

owner-3.name: David K. Chen
owner-3.bio: Weekend landscaper and home renovation DIYer. Why spend ₹65,000 on a commercial pressure washer or tile saw for a 2-day patio job? Borrow mine anytime.

user-alex.name: Alex Rivera
user-alex.bio: Full-stack developer by day, home improver and woodworker on weekends. I love both lending out my Makita kit and renting heavy fabrication tools when I need them.

currentUser.name: Alex Rivera
currentUser.bio: Full-stack developer by day, home improver and woodworker on weekends. I love both lending out my Makita kit and renting heavy fabrication tools when I need them.
